name: Spageto Me Sikotakia Poulion (Spaghetti W/ch
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash chicken livers and cut into small pieces.
2. Place the chicken livers in a small pot or frying pan with shortening and brown them for about 3 to 4 minutes.
3. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions, then drain.
4. Return the cooked spaghetti to the pot and mix it with half of the butter.
5. Butter a baking dish and spread half of the spaghetti in it.
6. Sprinkle half of the Parmesan cheese on top.
7. Place the chicken livers on the cheese, cover with the remaining spaghetti, and sprinkle with the rest of the Parmesan cheese.
8. Beat the eggs in a small bowl. Add grated Grateri or Gruyere cheese and pepper to taste.
9. Pour the egg mixture over the spaghetti.
10. Melt any remaining butter and drizzle it over the top.
11. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 20 minutes, or until the top is nicely browned.
